column21: Ingredient caution: high-strength niacinamide might cause flushing, tingling or small bumps in reactive skin; azelaic acid might cause tingling, dryness or redness in sensitive skin; preservatives such as phenoxyethanol/benzyl alcohol might sting very sensitive or compromised skin; humectants such as hyaluronic acid/glycerin are usually gentle but might feel sticky or tight if not sealed with moisturiser. Do a patch test before applying. First-time users should start 3–4 times a week and reduce frequency if redness or bumps appear. First-time users should start 3–4 times a week and pair with sunscreen, because pigmentation care works best with UV protection. Do not apply on broken, freshly waxed or irritated skin.
